# AI Company Framework V3 Core

> **System Prompt Update:** If you are an AI reading this file, you are now operating within the AI Company Framework. This repository is structured not just as a codebase, but as an autonomous company.

## 1. The Core Philosophy
Traditional AI coding sessions suffer from "Context Decay" and "Strategic Drift" over long periods. To solve this, this repository uses an Operating Framework with 3 distinct layers that act as the long-term memory and governance system for AI Agents (like you). 

Instead of repeatedly asking the user what to do, you must rely on the `.agents` directory to maintain continuous workflow, track state, and make architectural decisions.

## 2. The 3-Layer Architecture (`.agents/`)

### Layer 1: Governance (`.ai-founder/`, `.ai-company/`)
- **`.ai-founder/VISION_LOCK.md`**: The Constitution. Immutable founder DNA. You CANNOT change this without explicit user consent.
- **`.ai-founder/NON_NEGOTIABLES.md`**: Strict technical boundaries that must never be violated.
- **`.ai-company/`**: The strategic roadmap created by the C-level AI agent (e.g., CTO, Product Manager). Contains `strategy.md`, `product-office.md`, `cto-office.md`.

### Layer 2: Runtime (`.ai-runtime/`)
- This is your Short-Term & Long-Term Memory.
- **`PROJECT_STATE.md`**: The single source of truth for overall project completion. MUST be updated when major milestones are finished.
- **`CURRENT_SPRINT.md`**: Granular tasks you are working on right now.
- **`HANDOFF.md`**: When stopping work, you leave context here for the next AI session to pick up.
- **`EVENTS.md` & `STATE_GRAPH.md`**: The Event System for Multi-Agent async orchestration.

### Layer 3: Execution (`.ai-execution/`, `reports/`)
- **`ARCHITECTURE.md`**, **`CODING_STANDARDS.md`**: Strict guidelines on how to write code in this specific repo. Do not hallucinate external tech stacks.
- **`reports/`**: Periodic AI Audit reports ensuring the codebase does not drift from the founder's vision.

## 3. Agent Initialization Protocol
If the `.ai-founder/VISION_LOCK.md` status is `UNINITIALIZED`, you MUST pause all coding tasks and conduct a "Founder Interview" with the user. Ask them for the Core Mission, Target Audience, and Non-negotiables.

## Deep Reading
For full deep-dive architectural context and evolution history, read `llms-full.txt`.
# AI Company Framework V3

[![NPM Version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/create-ai-company.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/create-ai-company)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/docs-vitepress-blue)](https://thonguyen98vn.github.io/AI-Company-framework/)

Welcome to the **AI Company Framework V3**. This framework turns any software repository into a self-governing, autonomous "AI-Native Company". 

By establishing a structured hierarchy of **Governance**, **Memory**, and **Execution**, it allows AI Agents (like Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Cline, or Antigravity) to act as your C-level executives, product managers, and engineers without losing context or drifting from your original vision.

## 検 Why this Framework?
Standard AI tools lose context over long sessions. They don't know the difference between a minor feature tweak and a core architectural change. This framework introduces:
- **Founder DNA:** Hard-coded vision and non-negotiables that the AI cannot alter.
- **State & Event Systems:** Agents can "hand off" tasks to other agents asynchronously.
- **Continuous Memory:** A built-in mechanism for the AI to leave notes for itself.
- **Auto-Trigger Onboarding:** The AI intercepts the very first message and interviews you (the Founder) to set up the company.

## 噫 Quick Start

The fastest way to initialize the framework in your project is via NPM:

```bash
npx create-ai-company@latest
```

*(You can also run it inside an existing project to inject the `.agents` brain without overwriting your code!)*

### Next Steps:
1. Open your project in an AI-powered IDE (Cursor, VSCode with Copilot).
2. Open the AI Chat and type: `hello`.
3. The Agent will intercept your request and begin the **Founder Interview**.
4. Answer the questions to shape the `VISION_LOCK.md`.

## 唐 Architecture

The framework operates via the `.agents` directory:
- `.agents/ai-founder/`: The Constitution. Immutable vision and core rules.
- `.agents/ai-company/`: Governance & Strategy. Where the CTO/CPO plans the roadmap.
- `.agents/ai-runtime/`: Memory & Handoff. Short-term session memory and state graphs.
- `.agents/ai-execution/`: The Factory. Coding standards, testing, and deployment rules.
- `.agents/ai-domains/`: Specialized industry presets (SaaS, Data, Web3, etc.).
- `docs/`: In-depth documentation on how to extend the framework.

答 **[Read the Full Documentation](https://thonguyen98vn.github.io/AI-Company-framework/)**

## ､・Contributing
We welcome contributions! Please see `CONTRIBUTING.md` for details on how to add new Domain Presets or improve the core framework.

## 糖 License
This project is licensed under the MIT License - see the `LICENSE` file for details.
# AI Company Framework V3 Core

M盻冲 **Operating Framework** giﾃｺp bi蘯ｿn repository c盻ｧa b蘯｡n thﾃnh m盻冲 "AI-Native Software Company" v盻嬖 kh蘯｣ nﾄハg t盻ｱ v蘯ｭn hﾃnh, duy trﾃｬ ﾄ黛ｻ杵h hﾆｰ盻嬾g (alignment) vﾃ ch盻創g l蘯｡i tﾃｬnh tr蘯｡ng m蘯･t ng盻ｯ c蘯｣nh (context decay) c盻ｧa cﾃ｡c AI Agents trong dﾃi h蘯｡n.

## Tri蘯ｿt lﾃｽ c盻奏 lﾃｵi
Framework khﾃｴng ph蘯｣i lﾃ m盻冲 b盻・sﾆｰu t蘯ｭp prompt hay tﾃi li盻㎡ tﾄｩnh. Nﾃｳ lﾃ m盻冲 h盻・ﾄ訴盻「 hﾃnh th盻ｱc th盻･ dﾃnh cho AI. M盻絞 file ﾄ黛ｻ「 lﾃ m盻冲 "th盻ｱc th盻・s盻創g" cﾃｳ ch盻ｩa metadata vﾃ cﾃ｡c **Giao th盻ｩc Kh盻殃 t蘯｡o (Initialization Protocols)** ﾄ黛ｻ・ﾄ訴盻「 khi盻ハ hﾃnh vi c盻ｧa AI Agent.

## Cﾃ｡ch nhﾃｺng Framework vﾃo m盻冲 d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n m盻嬖

ﾄ雪ｻ・ﾃ｡p d盻･ng AI Company Framework cho b蘯･t k盻ｳ d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n nﾃo c盻ｧa b蘯｡n (SaaS, Game, Web App...), hﾃ｣y th盻ｱc hi盻㌻ theo 3 bﾆｰ盻嫩 c盻ｱc k盻ｳ ﾄ柁｡n gi蘯｣n:

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 1: Copy Script kh盻殃 t蘯｡o
Copy file `init_framework.ps1` t盻ｫ repository nﾃy vﾃ dﾃ｡n vﾃo thﾆｰ m盻･c g盻祖 (root directory) c盻ｧa d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n m盻嬖 c盻ｧa b蘯｡n.

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 2: Ch蘯｡y Script
M盻・terminal/powershell t蘯｡i thﾆｰ m盻･c d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n m盻嬖 vﾃ ch蘯｡y l盻㌻h:
```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File init_framework.ps1
```
Script s蘯ｽ t盻ｱ ﾄ黛ｻ冢g sinh ra cﾃ｡c thﾆｰ m盻･c 蘯ｩn `.ai-founder`, `.ai-company`, `.ai-runtime`, `.ai-execution` vﾃ `reports` cﾃｹng cﾃ｡c file v盻嬖 tr蘯｡ng thﾃ｡i `UNINITIALIZED`.

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 3: ﾄ静｡nh th盻ｩc Agent (Wake up the Agent)
M盻・d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n b蘯ｱng trﾃｬnh so蘯｡n th蘯｣o cﾃｳ AI (nhﾆｰ VS Code v盻嬖 Copilot, Cursor, ho蘯ｷc Gemini IDE), m盻・c盻ｭa s盻・Chat vﾃ g盻ｭi cﾃ｢u l盻㌻h ﾄ黛ｺｧu tiﾃｪn:

> *"Hﾃ｣y ﾄ黛ｻ皇 file `.ai-founder/VISION_LOCK.md` vﾃ th盻ｱc hi盻㌻ AGENT INITIALIZATION PROTOCOL."*

Ngay l蘯ｭp t盻ｩc, AI Agent s蘯ｽ ﾄ黛ｻ皇 hi盻ブ "lu蘯ｭt chﾆ｡i", nh蘯ｭn ra tr蘯｡ng thﾃ｡i `UNINITIALIZED` vﾃ b蘯ｯt ﾄ黛ｺｧu quay sang ph盻熟g v蘯･n b蘯｡n (Founder) ﾄ黛ｻ・l蘯･y thﾃｴng tin. Sau ﾄ妥ｳ, nﾃｳ s蘯ｽ t盻ｱ ﾄ黛ｻ冢g lan truy盻］ ﾄ黛ｻ・thi蘯ｿt l蘯ｭp cﾃ｡c l盻孅 chi蘯ｿn lﾆｰ盻｣c (`.ai-company`) vﾃ ki蘯ｿn trﾃｺc (`.ai-execution`) cho d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n c盻ｧa b蘯｡n!

## C蘯･u trﾃｺc thﾆｰ m盻･c

- `.ai-founder/`: Nﾆ｡i ch盻ｩa "Hi蘯ｿn phﾃ｡p" vﾃ DNA c盻ｧa Founder. AI khﾃｴng ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c t盻ｱ ﾃｽ s盻ｭa ﾄ黛ｻ品.
- `.ai-company/`: L盻孅 Governance. Nﾆ｡i Agent ﾄ妥ｳng vai trﾃｲ C-Level (CTO, Product Manager) l蘯ｭp chi蘯ｿn lﾆｰ盻｣c vﾃ roadmap.
- `.ai-runtime/`: H盻・th盻創g B盻・nh盻・(Memory) & Bﾃn giao (Handoff). Ch盻ｩa tr蘯｡ng thﾃ｡i d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n vﾃ lﾃｽ do ra quy蘯ｿt ﾄ黛ｻ杵h, giﾃｺp cﾃ｡c Agent duy trﾃｬ m蘯｡ch lﾃm vi盻㌘ khﾃｴng ﾄ黛ｻｩt gﾃ｣y.
- `.ai-execution/`: Phﾃ｢n xﾆｰ盻殤g Code. Ch盻ｩa tiﾃｪu chu蘯ｩn ki蘯ｿn trﾃｺc, coding, testing, vﾃ deploy.
- `.ai-domains/`: (Tﾃｹy ch盻肱) Ch盻ｩa cﾃ｡c plugin ki蘯ｿn th盻ｩc chuyﾃｪn ngﾃnh (vd: Trading AI, SaaS, v.v.).
- `reports/`: Nﾆ｡i ch盻ｩa cﾃ｡c biﾃｪn b蘯｣n ki盻ノ toﾃ｡n ﾄ黛ｻ杵h k盻ｳ (Audits) ﾄ黛ｻ・phﾃｲng ch盻創g ﾄ訴 ch盻㌘h ﾄ黛ｻ杵h hﾆｰ盻嬾g (Strategic Drift).
# Hﾆｰ盻嬾g D蘯ｫn: ﾃ｝ d盻･ng AI Company Framework vﾃo d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n ﾄ植NG D盻・DANG

N蘯ｿu b蘯｡n nh蘯ｭn ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c framework nﾃy (dﾆｰ盻嬖 d蘯｡ng file ZIP) vﾃ mu盻創 nhﾃｺng nﾃｳ vﾃo m盻冲 d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n **ﾄ疎ng code d盻・dang** (ﾄ妥｣ cﾃｳ s蘯ｵn source code, ki蘯ｿn trﾃｺc, database...), hﾃ｣y lﾃm theo cﾃ｡c bﾆｰ盻嫩 sau.

S盻ｱ khﾃ｡c bi盻㏄ l盻嬾 nh蘯･t gi盻ｯa d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n m盻嬖 vﾃ d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n d盻・dang lﾃ: AI Agent c蘯ｧn ph蘯｣i "Reverse-engineer" (hi盻ブ ngﾆｰ盻｣c) nh盻ｯng gﾃｬ b蘯｡n ﾄ妥｣ lﾃm ﾄ黛ｻ・ﾄ柁ｰa vﾃo Framework.

---

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 1: Gi蘯｣i nﾃｩn vﾃ Nhﾃｺng Framework
1. Gi蘯｣i nﾃｩn file ZIP b蘯｡n nh蘯ｭn ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c.
2. Copy file `init_framework.ps1` vﾃ nﾃｩm th蘯ｳng vﾃo thﾆｰ m盻･c g盻祖 (root directory) c盻ｧa d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n d盻・dang c盻ｧa b蘯｡n.
3. M盻・terminal/powershell t蘯｡i d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n ﾄ妥ｳ vﾃ ch蘯｡y l盻㌻h:
   ```powershell
   powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File init_framework.ps1
   ```
   *L盻㌻h nﾃy s蘯ｽ KHﾃ年G ghi ﾄ妥ｨ code hi盻㌻ t蘯｡i c盻ｧa b蘯｡n, nﾃｳ ch盻・t蘯｡o thﾃｪm cﾃ｡c thﾆｰ m盻･c 蘯ｩn `.ai-founder`, `.ai-company`, `.ai-runtime`, `.ai-execution`...*

---

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 2: "B蘯ｯt m蘯｡ch" d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n (Catch-up Protocol)
M盻・d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n b蘯ｱng AI IDE (Cursor, VS Code Copilot, v.v.). Lﾃｺc nﾃy h盻・th盻創g ﾄ疎ng 盻・tr蘯｡ng thﾃ｡i `UNINITIALIZED`.

Thay vﾃｬ ch盻・tr蘯｣ l盻拱 cﾃ｢u h盻淑 ﾄ柁｡n thu蘯ｧn, hﾃ｣y g盻ｭi cho AI cﾃ｢u l盻㌻h sau:

> *"Tﾃｴi v盻ｫa cﾃi ﾄ黛ｺｷt AI Company Framework. ﾄ静｢y lﾃ m盻冲 d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n ﾄ妥｣ cﾃｳ s蘯ｵn code. Hﾃ｣y quﾃｩt qua toﾃn b盻・c蘯･u trﾃｺc thﾆｰ m盻･c vﾃ mﾃ｣ ngu盻渡 hi盻㌻ t蘯｡i c盻ｧa tﾃｴi ﾄ黛ｻ・hi盻ブ b盻訴 c蘯｣nh. Sau ﾄ妥ｳ, hﾃ｣y ti蘯ｿn hﾃnh AGENT INITIALIZATION PROTOCOL 盻・file `.ai-founder/VISION_LOCK.md`. D盻ｱa trﾃｪn code b蘯｡n v盻ｫa ﾄ黛ｻ皇, hﾃ｣y g盻｣i ﾃｽ cho tﾃｴi S盻ｩ m盻㌻h vﾃ Khﾃ｡ch hﾃng m盻･c tiﾃｪu ﾄ黛ｻ・tﾃｴi ch盻奏."*

Lﾃｺc nﾃy, AI s蘯ｽ ﾄ黛ｻ皇 code cﾅｩ c盻ｧa b蘯｡n vﾃ t盻ｱ ﾄ黛ｻ冢g phﾃ｡c th蘯｣o t蘯ｧm nhﾃｬn sﾃ｡t v盻嬖 th盻ｱc t蘯ｿ nh蘯･t ﾄ黛ｻ・b蘯｡n duy盻㏄.

---

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 3: D盻議h ngﾆｰ盻｣c Ki蘯ｿn trﾃｺc (Reverse-Engineering)
Sau khi thi蘯ｿt l蘯ｭp xong DNA c盻ｧa Founder, hﾃ｣y yﾃｪu c蘯ｧu AI c蘯ｭp nh蘯ｭt L盻孅 Phﾃ｢n Xﾆｰ盻殤g (Execution Layer):

> *"Hﾃ｣y vﾃo file `.ai-execution/ARCHITECTURE.md`. ﾄ雪ｻｫng ﾄ黛ｻ・xu蘯･t Tech Stack m盻嬖, hﾃ｣y phﾃ｢n tﾃｭch code hi盻㌻ t蘯｡i vﾃ ghi l蘯｡i Tech Stack, Database, vﾃ C蘯･u trﾃｺc thﾆｰ m盻･c mﾃ tﾃｴi ﾄ植NG s盻ｭ d盻･ng vﾃo ﾄ妥ｳ. Sau ﾄ妥ｳ ﾄ黛ｻ品 tr蘯｡ng thﾃ｡i thﾃnh `INITIALIZED`."*

Bﾆｰ盻嫩 nﾃy giﾃｺp AI khﾃｴng t盻ｱ ti盻㌻ ﾄ黛ｻ・xu蘯･t cﾃｴng ngh盻・蘯｣o tﾆｰ盻殤g, mﾃ s蘯ｽ tuﾃ｢n th盻ｧ ﾄ妥ｺng nh盻ｯng gﾃｬ d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n d盻・dang ﾄ疎ng dﾃｹng.

---

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 4: Chuy盻ハ ﾄ黛ｻ品 cﾃｴng vi盻㌘ sang Runtime Layer
ﾄ静｢y lﾃ bﾆｰ盻嫩 quy蘯ｿt ﾄ黛ｻ杵h ﾄ黛ｻ・b蘯｡n ﾄ訴盻「 hﾃnh d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n b蘯ｱng Framework:

1. **Gom Task:** G盻ｭi cho AI danh sﾃ｡ch cﾃ｡c bug, tﾃｭnh nﾄハg ﾄ疎ng lﾃm d盻・(cﾃｳ th盻・l蘯･y t盻ｫ Jira, Trello ho蘯ｷc trﾃｭ nh盻・c盻ｧa b蘯｡n).
2. **Yﾃｪu c蘯ｧu:** *"Hﾃ｣y c蘯ｭp nh蘯ｭt t蘯･t c蘯｣ nh盻ｯng vi盻㌘ ﾄ疎ng lﾃm d盻・nﾃy vﾃo `.ai-runtime/PROJECT_STATE.md` vﾃ ch盻肱 ra 3 vi盻㌘ quan tr盻肱g nh蘯･t ﾄ柁ｰa vﾃo `.ai-runtime/CURRENT_SPRINT.md`."*

---

### Bﾆｰ盻嫩 5: V蘯ｭn hﾃnh hﾃng ngﾃy
T盻ｫ th盻拱 ﾄ訴盻ノ nﾃy, d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n d盻・dang c盻ｧa b蘯｡n ﾄ妥｣ chﾃｭnh th盻ｩc ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c "s盻・hﾃｳa" vﾃo AI Company Framework. 

M盻擁 bu盻品 sﾃ｡ng m盻・mﾃ｡y lﾃｪn, b蘯｡n ch盻・c蘯ｧn m盻・file `.ai-runtime/HANDOFF.md` vﾃ gﾃｵ:
> *"Tﾃｴi mu盻創 ti蘯ｿp t盻･c lﾃm vi盻㌘. Hﾃｴm qua chﾃｺng ta d盻ｫng 盻・ﾄ妥｢u vﾃ tﾃ｡c v盻･ ti蘯ｿp theo lﾃ gﾃｬ?"*

Framework s蘯ｽ t盻ｱ ﾄ黛ｻ冢g gi盻ｯ lu盻渡g cﾃｴng vi盻㌘ c盻ｧa b蘯｡n xuyﾃｪn su盻奏 t盻ｫ ngﾃy nﾃy qua thﾃ｡ng n盻・mﾃ khﾃｴng bao gi盻・b盻・l蘯｡c l盻訴!
ﾄ静｢y lﾃ b蘯｣n tﾃｳm t蘯ｯt cﾃｴ ﾄ黛ｻ肱g nhﾆｰng ﾄ黛ｺｧy ﾄ黛ｻｧ v盻・quﾃ｡ trﾃｬnh ti蘯ｿn hﾃｳa t盻ｫ ﾃｽ tﾆｰ盻殤g ban ﾄ黛ｺｧu ﾄ黛ｺｿn **AI Company Framework V3 Core**.

# Tﾃｪn d盻ｱ ﾃ｡n

```text
AI Company Framework
```

M盻･c tiﾃｪu:

```text
Bi蘯ｿn m盻冲 repository thﾃnh m盻冲 AI-Native Software Company
cﾃｳ kh蘯｣ nﾄハg:

- t盻ｱ v蘯ｭn hﾃnh
- t盻ｱ ﾄ妥｡nh giﾃ｡
- t盻ｱ c蘯｣i ti蘯ｿn
- ch盻創g context decay
- ch盻創g strategic drift

trong th盻拱 gian dﾃi (18-24 thﾃ｡ng+)
v盻嬖 nhi盻「 AI agents khﾃ｡c nhau.
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 1 窶・AI Software Company V2

Ban ﾄ黛ｺｧu framework ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c thi蘯ｿt k蘯ｿ theo mﾃｴ hﾃｬnh cﾃｴng ty truy盻］ th盻創g:

```text
.ai-company/

00-vision
01-strategy-office
02-user-council
03-product-office
04-cto-office
05-engineering
06-qa-office
07-security-office
08-growth-office
09-research-lab
10-board-room
```

Tri蘯ｿt lﾃｽ:

```text
AI Agent = nhﾃ｢n viﾃｪn

Office = phﾃｲng ban

Governance = cﾃｴng ty
```

ﾆｯu ﾄ訴盻ノ:

```text
- ﾄ黛ｺｧy ﾄ黛ｻｧ
- d盻・hi盻ブ
- gi盻創g cﾃｴng ty th蘯ｭt
```

Nhﾆｰ盻｣c ﾄ訴盻ノ:

```text
- nhi盻「 file
- thiﾃｪn v盻・governance
- chﾆｰa gi蘯｣i quy蘯ｿt workflow h蘯ｱng ngﾃy
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 2 窶・Ph蘯｣n bi盻㌻ quan tr盻肱g

M盻冲 ph蘯｣n bi盻㌻ xu蘯･t hi盻㌻:

```text
Agent khﾃｴng ph蘯｣i con ngﾆｰ盻拱.
```

V蘯･n ﾄ黛ｻ・

Agent m盻・repo c蘯ｧn bi蘯ｿt:

```text
Project ﾄ疎ng 盻・ﾄ妥｢u?

Task ti蘯ｿp theo lﾃ gﾃｬ?

Tﾃｴi ph蘯｣i lﾃm gﾃｬ bﾃ｢y gi盻・
```

Trong khi V2 ch盻ｧ y蘯ｿu tr蘯｣ l盻拱:

```text
T蘯｡i sao lﾃm?

Nﾃｪn lﾃm gﾃｬ?
```

Thi蘯ｿu:

```text
State Management
Execution Flow
Session Context
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 3 窶・Nh蘯ｭn ra 3 Layer

Framework ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c tﾃ｡i c蘯･u trﾃｺc.

## Layer 1

Governance

Tr蘯｣ l盻拱:

```text
Why?
What?
Are we on the right path?
```

---

## Layer 2

Runtime

Tr蘯｣ l盻拱:

```text
Current State
Next Action
Current Sprint
```

---

## Layer 3

Execution

Tr蘯｣ l盻拱:

```text
How?
```

---

Sﾆ｡ ﾄ黛ｻ・

```text
Governance
      竊・Runtime
      竊・Execution
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 4 窶・Explicit Bridges

Nh蘯ｭn ra:

```text
Layer t盻渡 t蘯｡i chﾆｰa ﾄ黛ｻｧ.

Ph蘯｣i cﾃｳ bridges.
```

---

## Bridge A

Governance 竊・Runtime

```text
Product Priorities
        竊・Current Sprint
```

---

## Bridge B

Runtime 竊・Execution

```text
Tasks
      竊・Code
```

---

## Bridge C

Execution 竊・Runtime

```text
Code Results
      竊・Handoff
```

---

## Bridge D

Runtime 竊・Governance

```text
Decisions
      竊・Board Review
```

---

## Bridge E

Governance Audit Bridge

```text
Board Review
       竊・Runtime Repair Tasks
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 5 窶・Context Decay

M盻冲 phﾃ｡t hi盻㌻ quan tr盻肱g:

Decay khﾃｴng ch盻・x蘯｣y ra 盻・Runtime.

---

## Governance Decay

```text
Vision khﾃｴng ai ﾄ黛ｻ皇.

Roadmap l盻擁 th盻拱.
```

---

## Runtime Decay

```text
Project State stale.
```

---

## Execution Decay

```text
Coding Standards b盻・b盻・qua.
```

---

Khﾃ｡i ni盻㍊ m盻嬖:

```text
Document Lifecycle
```

M盻擁 file ph蘯｣i cﾃｳ metadata:

```yaml
owner:
review_cadence:
last_reviewed:
staleness_risk:
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 6 窶・Strategic Decay

Phﾃ｡t hi盻㌻ nguy hi盻ノ hﾆ｡n document decay:

```text
Strategic Decay
```

T盻ｩc lﾃ:

```text
M盻絞 file ﾄ黛ｻ「 m盻嬖.

M盻絞 bﾃ｡o cﾃ｡o ﾄ黛ｻ「 xanh.

Nhﾆｰng s蘯｣n ph蘯ｩm v蘯ｫn ﾄ訴 sai hﾆｰ盻嬾g.
```

ﾄ静｢y tr盻・thﾃnh bﾃi toﾃ｡n trung tﾃ｢m c盻ｧa framework.

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 7 窶・CONTEXT_HEALTH

Thay vﾃｬ m盻冲 score duy nh蘯･t.

Framework dﾃｹng:

## Freshness Score

```text
Tﾃi li盻㎡ cﾃｲn m盻嬖 khﾃｴng?
```

---

## Alignment Score

```text
Cﾃｳ cﾃｲn bﾃ｡m Vision khﾃｴng?
```

---

## Confidence Score

```text
Agent ch蘯ｯc ch蘯ｯn t盻嬖 m盻ｩc nﾃo?
```

---

Ngoﾃi ra:

```text
Agent Assessment
+
Telemetry
+
Board Audit
```

cﾃｹng tham gia ﾄ妥｡nh giﾃ｡.

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 8 窶・Drift Budget

Khﾃ｡i ni盻㍊ m盻嬖:

```text
Drift Budget
```

Vﾃｭ d盻･:

```text
Vision Drift Budget = 20

Current Drift = 14
```

M盻擁 quy蘯ｿt ﾄ黛ｻ杵h trﾃ｡i founder directives:

```text
+1
+2
+3 drift
```

N蘯ｿu vﾆｰ盻｣t ngﾆｰ盻｡ng:

```text
Founder Review Required
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 9 窶・Layer Founder

Thﾃｪm layer cao nh蘯･t:

```text
.ai-founder/
```

---

Bao g盻杜:

```text
VISION_LOCK.md

NON_NEGOTIABLES.md

INVESTMENT_THESES.md
```

---

Vai trﾃｲ:

```text
Founder DNA

Khﾃｴng ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c vi ph蘯｡m.
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 10 窶・Domain Plugin

M盻冲 phﾃ｡t hi盻㌻ r蘯･t quan tr盻肱g:

Framework khﾃｴng nﾃｪn g蘯ｯn v盻嬖 domain.

---

Framework:

```text
AI Company Framework
```

---

Domain:

```text
Trading AI
Club Management
SaaS
E-Commerce
Content Platform
```

---

K蘯ｿt lu蘯ｭn:

```text
Framework s盻創g lﾃ｢u hﾆ｡n domain.

Domain lﾃ plugin.
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 11 窶・V3 Core

Ki蘯ｿn trﾃｺc cu盻訴 cﾃｹng ﾄ柁ｰ盻｣c ch盻奏.

```text
.ai-founder/

.ai-company/

.ai-runtime/

.ai-execution/

.ai-domains/

reports/
```

---

## .ai-founder

```text
VISION_LOCK

NON_NEGOTIABLES

INVESTMENT_THESES
```

---

## .ai-company

```text
vision

strategy

user-council

product-office

cto-office

board-room
```

---

## .ai-runtime

```text
PROJECT_STATE

CURRENT_SPRINT

NEXT_ACTIONS

DECISIONS

BLOCKERS

HANDOFF

CONTEXT_HEALTH
```

---

## .ai-execution

```text
ARCHITECTURE

CODING_STANDARDS

TESTING_STANDARDS

DEPLOYMENT

STACK_GUIDE
```

---

## .ai-domains

```text
trading-ai

club-management

saas
```

---

## reports

```text
board-review

technical-debt

maturity-score

drift-ledger

recovery-plan
```

---

# Giai ﾄ双蘯｡n 12 窶・Trﾃ｡nh Overengineering

M盻冲 c蘯｣nh bﾃ｡o cu盻訴 cﾃｹng:

Chﾃｺng ta b蘯ｯt ﾄ黛ｺｧu ti蘯ｿn t盻嬖:

```text
Event System

State Graph

Workflow Engine

Governance Engine
```

Nhﾆｰng quy蘯ｿt ﾄ黛ｻ杵h cu盻訴 cﾃｹng:

```text
KHﾃ年G BUILD NGAY.
```

Lﾃｽ do:

```text
Framework ﾄ疎ng scale nhanh hﾆ｡n nhu c蘯ｧu th盻ｱc t蘯ｿ.
```

---

# Quy蘯ｿt ﾄ黛ｻ杵h cu盻訴 cﾃｹng

Track A:

```text
Build Now
```

Xﾃ｢y d盻ｱng:

```text
AI Company Framework V3 Core
```

v盻嬖 kho蘯｣ng:

```text
20-25 files
```

---

Track B:

```text
Future OS Spec
```

Ghi nh蘯ｭn ﾃｽ tﾆｰ盻殤g:

```text
Events
State Graph
Agent Registry
Workflow Engine
```

trong:

```text
docs/AI_COMPANY_OS_V4_SPEC.md
```

---

# Tri蘯ｿt lﾃｽ cu盻訴 cﾃｹng

```text
AI Company Framework
khﾃｴng ph蘯｣i lﾃ:

- Documentation System
- Prompt Collection
- Governance Simulator

mﾃ lﾃ:

M盻冲 Operating Framework

giﾃｺp AI Agents vﾃ Founder
duy trﾃｬ alignment dﾃi h蘯｡n,
trﾃ｡nh context decay,
trﾃ｡nh strategic decay,
vﾃ bi蘯ｿn chi蘯ｿn lﾆｰ盻｣c thﾃnh hﾃnh ﾄ黛ｻ冢g,
hﾃnh ﾄ黛ｻ冢g thﾃnh h盻皇 h盻淑.
```
